title: erycibe glomerata
intro: Erycibe glomerata, also known as the cluster vine or cluster pea vine, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Erycibe glomerata include treating fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Erycibe glomerata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a paste or powder for topical applications.
